window_summary: This window tracks the vuejs/vue release stream from early v2.7.0 alpha and beta prereleases through the stable v2.7.x series, culminating in the final v2.7.16 "Swan Song" release that marks the end of life for Vue 2.

chunks.title: v2.7.16 "Swan Song"
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: vuejs/vue
Release: v2.7.16 "Swan Song"
Tag: v2.7.16; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-12-24T15:02:39Z; created_at: 2023-12-24T15:02:07Z
Release notes:
**This is the final release for Vue 2.**
Vue 2 will reach End of Life on December 31st, 2023. For more details, please read this [blog post](https://blog.vuejs.org/posts/vue-2-eol).
Please refer to [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/vuejs/vue/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the vuejs/vue release v2.7.16 "Swan Song", the release note states that this is the final release for Vue 2, which will reach End of Life on December 31st, 2023, and directs users to the CHANGELOG.md for details.

questions.query_text: In the vuejs/vue releases, which release note explicitly states that it is the final release for Vue 2 and mentions the End of Life date?

answer_support.answer_text: This is the final release for Vue 2. Vue 2 will reach End of Life on December 31st, 2023.

questions.query_text: Across the vuejs/vue releases, how does the release note content of v2.7.0 "Naruto" differ from that of v2.7.16 "Swan Song"?

options.text: v2.7.0 includes an image and a CHANGELOG reference, while v2.7.16 announces the final release and End of Life date.
v2.7.0 announces the final release, while v2.7.16 includes an image.
Both releases contain identical release notes.
v2.7.0 is a beta release, while v2.7.16 is an alpha release.

questions.expected_answer: v2.7.0 includes an image and a CHANGELOG reference, while v2.7.16 announces the final release and End of Life date.

answer_support.answer_text: includes an image and directs users to the CHANGELOG.md
states that this is the final release for Vue 2, which will reach End of Life on December 31st, 2023

questions.query_text: In the vuejs/vue release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release note that includes an image and a CHANGELOG reference, (2) a release note that directs users to the CHANGELOG.md for details, (3) a release note that announces the final release and End of Life date.

answer_support.answer_text: directs users to the CHANGELOG.md for details
includes an image and directs users to the CHANGELOG.md
announces the final release and End of Life date
